listitem.para: a n-by-1 or 1-by-n matrix of doubles, integer value, positive, the number of levels for each factor i, for i=1,2,...,n
a m-by-n matrix of doubles, the experiments, where m=prod(levels)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Computes a full factorial design with prescribed number of levels for each factor. In other words, for each factor i, the number of levels is levels(i), for i=1,2,...,n.

refsection.title: Examples
